summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for EasyBill Invoice Module. Fixed critical Mixed Content bug in frontend API calls. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend invoice CRUD flow working correctly.

minor.issue: Routes require trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect that loses Authorization header. Fixed in api.js

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - Missing trailing slashes in API URLs caused 307 redirects that lost Authorization headers, resulting in Mixed Content errors

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: api.js was missing trailing slashes on list/create endpoints causing 307 redirects that lost auth headers
Backend routes are defined with trailing slashes (e.g., @router.get('/')) but frontend was calling without them
seed_data_creation: Created test customers via API for invoice testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice module fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_invoices_crud.py cover: create, list, get, update, delete, send, mark-paid, partial-payment. Frontend api.js has been fixed with trailing slashes. Test user: onboard_test@test.com / testpass123

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.bug: Mixed Content Error - API calls failing with 'Not authenticated'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: Frontend api.js was making API calls without trailing slashes (e.g., /api/customers?company_id=...). FastAPI routes are defined with trailing slashes, causing 307 redirects. During redirect, the Authorization header was being lost.
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added trailing slashes to all list/create endpoints in api.js (e.g., /api/customers/?company_id=...)
